bead.title: operator-prompts: operatorPromptSubmit mutation + CSRF + idempotency + identity-bound audit
bead.description: GraphQL mutation operatorPromptSubmit. CSRF token required. Idempotency key required. Audit captures originating identity (localhost user OR ts-net WhoIs). Default status = proposed (not ready).
bead.acceptance: 1. operatorPromptSubmit mutation in schema. 2. CSRF required (returns 403 without). 3. Idempotency key dedupes within 24h window. 4. Audit event includes identity. 5. Default = proposed. 6. Tests cover all five.
